prompt: Editorial fashion product photograph. The same dark-haired woman wearing the exact same plaid midi dress as the reference image: V-neck bodice, elbow-length gathered sleeves with adjustable ties, shirred elastic waist, full A-line skirt, black pointed flats. Setting: an outdoor Mediterranean cafe terrace with a warm ochre lime-washed plaster wall, soft dappled leaf shadow, pale flagstone paving, soft natural mid-morning sunlight and gentle shadows. CRITICAL FABRIC COLOR: render the dress as a balanced plum-purple tartan plaid with fine navy and burgundy lines on a cool neutral ground, exactly as it appears under neutral studio lighting. Do NOT allow the warm sunlight to tint the fabric orange, brown or red. Keep the garment white balance cool and color-accurate while the wall and stone stay warm. The dress must read true plum and navy, never warm. Full length, the model is the clear hero filling most of the frame, dress in sharp focus, photoreal, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, soft film grade. Pose: standing front-facing and centered against the open ochre wall with no furniture, weight shifted onto one hip, one hand lightly holding the skirt, looking slightly off camera.
